zh.Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland: 德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Bocholt Sr.於大約1263年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可時，他的父親Siegfried Bocholt Sr.23歲，母親Hildegunde Coesfeld21歲。他於大約1284年與Hedwig Cymessen在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年在他的家鄉享年84歲。

zh-hans.Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland: 德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Bocholt Sr.于大约1263年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可时，他的父亲Siegfried Bocholt Sr.23岁，母亲Hildegunde Coesfeld21岁。他于大约1284年与Hedwig Cymessen在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦盧貝可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年在他的家乡享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bocholt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived near a beech wood, from Middle Low German bōk ‘beech’ + holt ‘wood’. Compare Bookhout .

variants.name: Bookhout
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   Boekhout  . Compare   Bookout  .

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Bocholt Sr. was born about 1263, in Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Siegfried Bocholt Sr., was 23 and his mother, Hildegunde Coesfeld, was 21. He married Hedwig Cymessen about 1284, in Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1346, in his hometown, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Bocholt Sr. est né environ 1263, à Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Siegfried Bocholt Sr., avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hildegunde Coesfeld, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig Cymessen environ 1284, à Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Bocholt Sr. um 1263 in Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siegfried Bocholt Sr. 23 und seine Mutter Hildegunde Coesfeld 21. Er hat um 1284 in Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland Hedwig Cymessen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 84 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Bocholt Sr. è nato il circa 1263 nel Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, il suo padre, Siegfried Bocholt Sr., aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Hildegunde Coesfeld, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig Cymessen circa 1284, nel Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1346, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland: ドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインルuベック
ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich Bocholt Sr.が約1263年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインルuベックで生まれた時，父Siegfried Bocholt Sr.は23歳，母Hildegunde Coesfeldは21歳であった。約1284年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインルuベックでHedwig Cymessenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に故郷で84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Bocholt Sr.(이)가 대략 1263년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 u벡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siegfried Bocholt Sr.(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegunde Coesfeld(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1284년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 u벡에서 Hedwig Cymessen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Bocholt Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Siegfried Bocholt Sr., tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hildegunde Coesfeld, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig Cymessen aproximadamente 1284, em Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1346, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Bocholt Sr. родился около 1263 г. в местности лuбекк, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Siegfried Bocholt Sr. было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hildegunde Coesfeld, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig Cymessen около 1284 г. в местности лuбекк, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1346 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich Bocholt Sr. nació aproximadamente 1263, en Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Siegfried Bocholt Sr., tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hildegunde Coesfeld, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hedwig Cymessen aproximadamente 1284, en Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1346, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años.
